notes: monitor_id: run probe to find yours — the 'Short Monitor ID' value in the output
vcp_value: common values are 15=DisplayPort, 17=HDMI1, 18=HDMI2 — verify with probe
Remove inputs you don't need, add more if required (up to 5 supported in UI)
Keyboard shortcuts are assigned automatically: 1, 2, 3... per input order
port: change if 5757 is already in use on your machine
